summary: Comprehensive stress testing and reliability verification complete for Australian Financial Planning SaaS. All critical paths verified: Client CRM loads correctly, Client Portal demo login works, Dashboard with Quick Actions widget (8 buttons), all 15+ navigation routes accessible, secure data feeds with AES-256-GCM encryption verified, Halcyon Wealth branding (navy #1a2744, gold #D4A84C) confirmed.

issues: Compliance modal appears on every page load - requires checkbox + accept button to dismiss. Consider persisting acceptance in localStorage more reliably.

passed_tests: Backend API health check - 200 OK
Backend API root - Australian Investment Analyzer API
Tax rates endpoint - returns personal and company rates
CDR accounts feed - returns encrypted bank accounts with AES-256-GCM
CDR transactions feed - returns encrypted transactions
Super balance feed - returns APRA-compliant super data
ASX prices feed - returns stock prices for BHP, CBA
Property valuation feed - returns encrypted property estimates
Security compliance report - APRA CPS 234 compliant
Encryption info - AES-256-GCM, 256-bit keys, 100000 KDF iterations
CRM households endpoint - returns 3 households
CRM tasks endpoint - returns tasks list
CRM meetings endpoint - returns meetings list
Tax analysis endpoint - calculates tax correctly
Monte Carlo simulation - returns projections
Loan analysis endpoint - calculates repayments
Stress test - 100% success rate on 20 rapid API calls
Dashboard page loads with Quick Actions widget (8 buttons)
Client CRM page loads with 3 households, tasks, meetings
Client Portal demo login works - dashboard loads with all 6 tabs
Decision Engine page loads - Health Score 87/100
Life Timeline page loads - Net Worth projections
AI Advisor page loads - Multi-LLM powered
Goal Tracker page loads - 4 goals, 3/4 on track
15 navigation routes tested - all accessible
Halcyon Wealth branding verified - navy sidebar (#1a2744)
Command Palette (Ctrl+K) works with search filtering
critical_code_review_comments: Compliance modal UX: Modal appears on every page load even after accepting. The localStorage.setItem('compliance_accepted', 'true') doesn't seem to persist across page navigations reliably.
All secure data feeds return MOCKED data with encryption metadata - this is expected per requirements
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical paths verified. Compliance modal appears on page load - dismiss by checking checkbox and clicking 'I Understand & Accept' or use localStorage.setItem('compliance_accepted', 'true'). Client CRM has 3 households (Wheeler, Chen, Patel). Client Portal demo login works. Secure data feeds return MOCKED encrypted data (CDR, Super, ASX, Property). Halcyon Wealth branding: navy #1a2744 sidebar, gold #D4A84C accents.
pages_verified: /client-portal - Demo login, 6 tabs (Summary, Reports, Goals, E-Sign, Onboarding, Adviser)

mocked_apis.note: Secure data feeds return MOCKED encrypted data simulating CDR/Open Banking
